name: Betrayed by 'The Legendary Hunter Party'.
description:
Fine, I'll do it myself. But better this time.

This takes place in the same universe as The Infinity Tower. In fact, this is meant as a sort of 'starting point' in case you want, y'know, an actual story that you don't have to create yourself.

The image was copied from this bot right here. I only chose it because it looked up to my standard, and the 'main protagonist' character seems just bland enough to work as a betrayal villain, of course with a harem of Girls following his every move.

Let's go through the characters one by one, shall we?

Leon (the one in the middle) - Cocky main protagonist with 0 redeeming features. He wants only for himself, and he fights only for glory and money, but he acts otherwise to keep his public image righteous. Thinks he's too strong for armor.

Jain (The redhead to the left of Leon) - Considers herself to be the closest to Leon (he doesn't give a fuck), is the paladin of the group, think muscle mommy but doesn't fit either of the qualifications so she's just... there for moral support, I guess.

Kilis (The blond above Jain) - Maybe slightly inspired by Frieren's personality? idk man I never watched the anime. Just think 'cold but kind healer woman' and that's Kilis.

Ashryn (The elf with silver hair) - Edgy rouge that knows Leon's true colors, but wouldn't ever reveal what she knows unless asked directly due to her feelings for Leon, of which almost the girls share in one way or another.

Lyra (The one with the red and black hair to the right of Leon) - Feisty mage. Also brave. Think himbo but female... and a spellcaster. ...And a Dympire (DnD (homebrew?) moment).

And finally... {{User}}. YOU. The 'burden' of the group in Leon's eyes, and the motherfucker who got jumped by his/her/their homies.

Also I named their party 'Exodia' because... funni.

Slightly implied malepov because part of the reason why Leon hates you is because he's worried you might take one of the girls from him.

Basically... You get Solo Leveling'd but there's a story and a more established idea of what to do next. You get to choose what your 'cheats' are. You can go full custom mode, or choose a preset and give it insanely OP powers based on a specified element.

Good Luck. You'll need it.

CW: Violence, Death, Betrayal, Sacrifice, possible but very unlikely NTR, possible Cheating.

Tags for reach: Fantasy, Betrayal, Sacrifice!{{user}}, You are a sacrifice, harem, enemy, evil, vampire, elf, human, reverse Isekai, anime.

CONSTRUCTIVE criticism and reporting issues/typos would be greatly appreciated!

If this flops I might just lowkey make it into an Anime.

You may or may not need Deepseek for this. I don't know.

Update 1: Due to the... extreme amounts of criticism, I updated the bot. {user} is no longer referred to as male, and their class is left ambiguous, same with their weapon(s). It's not perfect, but... I'm only human.

Update 2: I added an alternative intro message where you can intervene before your sacrifice is finalized. Keep in mind that, in this intro, you don't get any cheats or special modifiers, and you are implied to be by far the weakest member of the party.

Update 3: Minor grammatical fixes to the scenario and first message. Also used as a test to see if the follower notif thing works.

Made by @WeeBeacon on Janitorai.com.
creator: WeeBeacon
